mapper.select:
SELECT e.id AS entry_id,
r.id AS race_id, r.race_name, r.race_date, r.place, r.distance, r.surface, r.weather, r.track_condition,
h.id AS horse_id, h.name AS horse_name, h.age, h.sex,
e.jockey, e.running_style, e.distance_aptitude, e.jockey_score, e.frame_number, e.horse_number, e.odds, e.popularity, e.recent_result, e.result_rank
FROM race_entries e JOIN horses h ON e.horse_id = h.id JOIN races r ON e.race_id = r.id WHERE r.id = #{raceId} ORDER BY e.horse_number
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO horses (name, age, sex) VALUES (#{horseName}, #{age}, #{sex})

INSERT INTO race_entries ( race_id, horse_id, jockey, running_style, distance_aptitude, jockey_score, frame_number, horse_number, odds, popularity, recent_result, result_rank ) VALUES ( #{raceId}, #{horseId}, #{form.jockey}, #{form.runningStyle}, #{form.distanceAptitude}, #{form.jockeyScore}, #{form.frameNumber}, #{form.horseNumber}, #{form.odds}, #{form.popularity}, #{form.recentResult}, NULL )
mapper.select:
SELECT e.id AS entry_id,
r.id AS race_id, r.race_name, r.race_date, r.place, r.distance, r.surface, r.weather, r.track_condition,
h.id AS horse_id, h.name AS horse_name, h.age, h.sex,
e.jockey, e.running_style, e.distance_aptitude, e.jockey_score, e.frame_number, e.horse_number, e.odds, e.popularity, e.recent_result, e.result_rank
FROM race_entries e JOIN horses h ON e.horse_id = h.id JOIN races r ON e.race_id = r.id WHERE e.id = #{entryId}
mapper.update: UPDATE race_entries SET jockey = #{jockey}, running_style = #{runningStyle}, distance_aptitude = #{distanceAptitude}, jockey_score = #{jockeyScore}, frame_number = #{frameNumber}, horse_number = #{horseNumber}, odds = #{odds}, popularity = #{popularity}, recent_result = #{recentResult} WHERE id = #{entryId}
